generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled occupancy sensor collecting real-time occupancy data for adaptive control systems"
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental temperature sensor providing real-time temperature readings for HVAC optimization"
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental humidity sensor collecting real-time humidity data for indoor climate control"
]

instance LightIntensitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting intensity sensor measuring ambient light levels for adaptive lighting control"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy consumption meter tracking real-time energy usage across building systems"
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightIntensityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightIntensitySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMeter
]

instance DeviceMetadataDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DeviceMetadataModel
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched Building Information Model serving as the core semantic backbone for static and dynamic building data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BimEnrichmentEnabler, ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance DeviceMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Metadata model containing sensor/actuator configurations and control logic specifications embedded within BIM"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BimEnrichmentEnabler
]

instance LightingControlSemantics : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific lighting control semantics from TwinLight project embedded in BIM models for automated commissioning"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance ReinforcementLearningPolicy : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning policies from BOREALIS project for adaptive control of building systems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data including sensor streams and energy consumption metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, LightIntensityDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance ControlLogicData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed control logic data derived from device metadata and middleware specifications"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DeviceMetadataDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance DeviceMetadataData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Standardized device metadata including sensor/actuator configurations and middleware endpoints"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DeviceMetadataDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware for real-time IoT data ingestion and normalization from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataIngestionService, DataNormalizationService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin state management and bidirectional synchronization with physical assets"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateManagementService, BidirectionalSynchronizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform for rich 3D visualization and immersive monitoring of building systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService, ScenarioSimulationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework automating extraction of domain semantics from BIM and generation of runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedDeploymentService, RuntimeArtifactGenerationService
]

instance BimEnrichmentEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Toolset for semantically enriching BIM models with device metadata and middleware specifications"
    DTDFVocab:enables BimEnrichmentService, SemanticIntegrationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling real-time ingestion of sensor data via Eclipse Hono middleware"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeOperationalStateInsight
]

instance DataNormalizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service normalizing and validating incoming sensor data streams"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidatedDataInsight
]

instance StateManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing digital twin state and synchronization with physical assets via Eclipse Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizedStateInsight
]

instance BidirectionalSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling continuous bidirectional data exchange between physical and virtual systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides BidirectionalDataFlowInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive 3D visualization of building systems in Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides Interactive3DVisualizationInsight
]

instance ScenarioSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling performance modeling and scenario testing within the 3D environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance AutomatedDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating deployment of runtime artifacts from BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentStatusInsight
]

instance RuntimeArtifactGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating Eclipse Hono/Ditto configurations and device configurations from BIM"
    DTDFVocab:provides GeneratedArtifactsInsight
]

instance BimEnrichmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service semantically enriching BIM models with device metadata and middleware specifications"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnrichedBimModelInsight
]

instance SemanticIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service integrating enriched BIM models with digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:provides IntegratedSemanticModelInsight
]

instance AdaptiveLightingControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing reinforcement learning-based adaptive lighting control from BOREALIS project"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedLightingControlAction, EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service embedding control logic from TwinLight project into BIM models for streamlined deployment"
    DTDFVocab:provides CommissioningStatusInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing predictive analytics for maintenance scheduling and optimization recommendations"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight, OptimizationRecommendationsInsight
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator for lighting systems with adaptive control capabilities"
]

    base:desc "Building Control System actuator for HVAC systems with adaptive control capabilities"

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual world to the physical world involve **control signals** generated by the DT and transmitted back to the Building Control Systems (BCS) or IoT actuators. For example, the DT may adjust lighting levels (via **BOREALIS’ reinforcement learning policies**) or trigger HVAC responses based on real-time data analysis. The framework supports **automated commissioning** (as in **TwinLight**) by embedding control logic directly into BIM models, enabling seamless deployment of virtual-to-physical commands. Eclipse **Ditto** manages the state of digital twins and ensures synchronized updates to physical systems via middleware integration."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical assets and the DT, with continuous updates for operational monitoring and control. The DT also supports long-term lifecycle management, including design, construction, and operational phases."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  - **BIM Core**: Central semantic model integrating static and dynamic data.
  - **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse **Hono/Ditto** for real-time data exchange and state management.
  - **Control Layer**: Embedded within BIM (e.g., **TwinLight’s** control semantics or **BOREALIS’** RL policies).
  - **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** for interactive 3D monitoring.
  - **Extension Layer**: Custom services/plugins integrated via standardized interfaces.
  The constellation supports **modular deployment**, allowing components to be scaled or replaced independently. The framework ensures **interoperability** across heterogeneous systems via standardized protocols (e.g., MQTT, AMQP)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following life cycle stages of the physical building:
  1. **Design Phase**: Leverages BIM models to represent the **as-designed** state, including geometric, spatial, and functional attributes.
  2. **Construction Phase**: Integrates **as-manufactured** data (e.g., deviations from design) via BIM updates.
  3. **Operational Phase**: Synchronizes with **as-operated** data (e.g., sensor readings, maintenance logs) to reflect real-time conditions.
  4. **Refurbishment/Adaptation**: Supports dynamic updates to the DT to accommodate modifications (e.g., retrofitting, reconfigurations). The framework ensures continuity across phases by maintaining semantic consistency via BIM."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is evaluated using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which measures how well the DT reflects its physical counterpart. Validation involves ensuring semantic coherence, real-time synchronization, and alignment with operational requirements. Uncertainty is addressed through automated data normalization and bidirectional communication protocols."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections use **Eclipse Hono** for IoT data ingestion and **Ditto** for digital twin management, with standardized protocols for bidirectional communication. The network architecture supports real-time data exchange between physical assets and the DT."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed using a **model-driven framework** that automates the generation of runtime artifacts (e.g., middleware configurations, visualization models) from enriched BIM models. The framework supports **scalable deployment** across heterogeneous infrastructure environments, reducing manual effort and enhancing maintainability. While the exact hosting environment (e.g., cloud or edge) is not specified, the architecture is designed for **modularity and extensibility**, allowing deployment on scalable platforms. The focus is on **automated, reproducible setups** to ensure consistency across projects."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems is supported via standardized extension points and middleware (Hono/Ditto). This includes compatibility with other DTs, IoT platforms, and AECO-specific tools (e.g., BIM software). Interoperability is ensured through semantic modeling and automated transformations."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards** such as **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the semantic backbone. It leverages **open-source middleware** (Eclipse Hono and Ditto) for standardized data exchange and integration. While specific standards like **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** or **COBie (Construction Operations Building Information Exchange)** are not explicitly mentioned, the framework emphasizes **interoperability** and **modularity** to align with broader industry standards. The use of **BIM** ensures compatibility with existing AECO workflows and tools."
]
